evals.prompt: What's the talent supply for senior React developers in Berlin right now?
evals.expected_output: Uses atlas_chat (not advisor) since this requires live data tools, presents talent supply/demand data for React developers in Berlin.

assertions.name: uses_full_chat
assertions.description: Calls atlas_chat (not atlas_advisor_chat) for data-heavy question

assertions.name: shows_data
assertions.description: Presents talent supply/demand data with market context

evals.prompt: Quick question — should I include equity in this offer for a mid-level PM?
evals.expected_output: Uses atlas_advisor_chat for quick lightweight advice, provides hiring recommendation.

assertions.name: uses_advisor
assertions.description: Calls atlas_advisor_chat for simple hiring question
